SEARCH
Package org.praxisplatform.uischema.annotation

Annotation Interface AnalyticsProjection

@Retention(RUNTIME) public @interface AnalyticsProjection
Projection semantica analitica opcional anexada a uma operacao real.

    Modifier and Type
    Required Element
    Description
    String
    id
